---
title: "DataCheck-STAT4640"
author: "Sanjit Subhash"
date: "2026-03-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Data Check (For the plots)

```{r}
data <- read.csv("/Users/sanjitsubhash/Downloads/TruthfulQA.csv")

# Create question length variable
data$question_length <- nchar(data$Question)

# Histogram of question length
hist(data$question_length,
     main="Distribution of Question Length",
     xlab="Number of Characters",
     col="lightblue",
     border="black")

# Questions per category
barplot(table(data$Category),
        las=2,
        col="lightgreen",
        main="Number of Questions by Category",
        ylab="Count")
```
